Hero.subtitle: Streamline processes first, then use technology to boost efficiency.
Hero.title: We help SMEs streamline processes × integrate tech × boost efficiency
Hero.description: Combining AI, n8n, and lightweight system integration, we help you organize workflows, connect tools, and reduce repetitive manual work, allowing your team to focus on what truly matters.

PainPoints.section_title: Is your company stuck here too?
PainPoints.section_subtitle: Seemingly small manual processes often accumulate into massive wastes of time and money.
PainPoints.point_1_desc: Documents, quotes, and forms require manual sorting, leading to omissions.
PainPoints.point_2_desc: Inquiries scattered across WhatsApp are hard to track and manage.
PainPoints.point_3_desc: Manually organizing data and generating quotes is time-consuming and prone to errors.
PainPoints.point_4_desc: Manual rescheduling and staff reassignments cause constant confusion.
PainPoints.point_5_desc: Lack of transparency makes it hard for staff to answer client questions.
PainPoints.point_6_desc: Payments, invoices, and collections require manual reminders.
PainPoints.point_7_desc: Data spread across tools makes searching and analysis slow.
PainPoints.point_8_desc: Repeated data entry leads to typos or missed information.
PainPoints.point_9_desc: Sales and backend info are out of sync, causing handoff issues.

Services.section_subtitle: We provide lightweight, flexible, and high ROI solutions specifically designed for SMEs.
Services.service_1_desc: Review current workflows to identify the most time-consuming, error-prone, and high-impact areas for optimization.
Services.service_2_desc: Connect repetitive tasks using n8n, AI, Email, Google Sheets, Forms, Calendar, CRM, and other tools.
Services.service_3_desc: Build CRM, quoting workflows, ticket tracking, payment reminders, Dashboards, or internal management systems.
Services.service_4_desc: Monitor usage post-implementation to adjust workflows and improve efficiency as your business grows.

HowItWorks.section_subtitle: We are not just selling software; we are your workflow optimization partner, guiding you from identifying pain points to system rollout.
HowItWorks.step_1_desc: We first understand your current workflows, tools, team division, and biggest bottlenecks.
HowItWorks.step_2_desc: We organize chaotic operational steps into clear processes, identifying areas to simplify, standardize, or automate.
HowItWorks.step_3_desc: We integrate AI, n8n, forms, CRM, Email, Calendar, Dashboards, or your existing tools based on your needs.
We integrate AI, n8n, forms, CRM, Email, Calendar, Dashboards, or your existing tools based on your needs.
HowItWorks.step_4_desc: We help your team actually use it, making processes trackable, handoffs smooth, and enabling continuous improvement.

Industries.section_subtitle: Optimaks is ideal for SMEs with stable business but increasingly chaotic daily operations. If your team spends too much time managing work instead of doing work, we can help.
Industries.condition_1: Still heavily rely on WhatsApp, Excel, Email, and manual tracking
Industries.condition_2: Want to adopt AI or automation but don't know where to start
Industries.condition_3: Don't want to implement a huge system all at once, just want to fix the biggest pain points first
Industries.link: See how we can help you

FinalCTA.title: Don't know where to start optimizing?
FinalCTA.subtitle: Take a 1-minute workflow audit to quickly identify bottlenecks and priority areas for improvement.
FinalCTA.note: No meetings, no long texts, just click a few options.

Footer.slogan: Streamline processes, let technology help you grow.
